text:
CLM_VBP_PRTCPNT_IND_CD 
LONG NAME: CLM_VBP_PRTCPNT_IND_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
Y = Participating in Hospital Value Based Purchasing 
N = Not participating in Hospital Value Based Purchasing 
Null/missing = same as “N” 
COMMENT: 
The ACA (Section 3001) excludes from the HVBP hospitals that meet certain conditions. Additional 
information is available on the CMS "Hospital Value-Based Purchasing" website. 
This initiative began in fourth quarter of 2013 (i.e., beginning
